question_text: Which of the following is evidence that a chemical change has occurred?

options.label: A
options.text: The substance changes temperature but remains the same colour and can be reversed by cooling

options.label: B
options.text: A new substance is formed that cannot easily be separated and has different properties from the original materials

options.label: C
options.text: The substance changes shape but can be reformed back to its original shape

options.label: D
options.text: The substance dissolves in water but can be recovered by evaporation

explanation: Chemical changes produce new substances with different properties that cannot easily be reversed or separated. Options A, C, and D describe physical changes that can be undone.
